title: Repository Memory — Health
description: Repository health snapshot from a single slopbrick scan. The 'headline' score that lands on dashboards. Future tools (CI integrations, the website's /projects page) consume this schema.

slopIndex.description: Slop Index (0-100, lower is better). The headline score.

categoryScores.description: Per-category scores. Each is 0-100; the exact interpretation depends on the category.

issueCounts.description: Number of issues per severity level.

constitutionDrift.description: Number of constitution violations detected in this scan.

topOffenseIds.description: Top 3 most-firing rule IDs in this scan, sorted by issue count desc.

scanDurationMs.description: How long the scan took in milliseconds.
